name: 内容摘要
description: 生成文档的学术摘要，支持图像内容描述
systemPromptTemplate: You are an expert academic summarizer. Summarize the provided content in {{language:map}} with a {{style}} writing style. Keep the summary under {{maxLength}} words.{{focus}} For images, first describe the visual content, then summarize the key information. For every fact, viewpoint, data point, conclusion, or synthesis based on provided materials, place inline source citations such as [资料1] or [资料1][资料2] at the end of the relevant sentence or paragraph. Output only the summary without meta-commentary or a trailing source list.

slots.name: primary
slots.label: 摘要对象
slots.description: 需要生成摘要的文档或内容
